fiveStar.name: Everlasting Garden
fiveStar.skill:
Increase medicine effects by 20.0%/20.0%/26.0%/26.0%/32.0%/32.0%/38.0%. Also, when using medicine on an ally, also increase the main target's critical damage by 15.3%/19.9%/19.9%/24.5%/24.5%/29.1%/29.1% for 3 turns.
When using a skill on an ally, increase the main target's Attack by 10.0%/13.0%/13.0%/16.0%/16.0%/19.0%/19.0% for 2 turns.

fourStar.name: Tea Time Delight
fourStar.skill: Increase max HP by 12.0%/12.0%/16.0%/16.0%/20.0%/20.0%/24.0%. When using a skill on an ally, increase Beachflower Minami's critical multiplier by 17.4%/22.6%/22.6%/27.8%/27.8%/33.0%/33.0%.
